ICandidateConfigService Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The ICandidateConfigService type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
AddCandidateParameterConfig
Declares a new parameter configuration.
AddDataSourceTable
Configures a link between a method parameter and the specified database table.
AddDataSourceUrl
Configures a link between a method parameter and the specified data source URL.
GetData
GetOrAddFkCandidateRouteAsync
GetParameterDataSourceConfiguration
Returns the configured configuration for the specified parameter, or null if it has not been declared.
